daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving balance meets breakthrough energy. Mercury's whispering secrets about authenticity, so lean into what feels real rather than what looks good. Trust the quiet knowing.
daily.love: Someone's paying attention to the little things you do. Whether single or coupled, your genuine self is magnetic rn. Don't dim it down—vulnerability is literally your superpower today.
daily.career: Ideas are flowing but patience is the move. You're seeing the bigger picture more clearly, so jot things down even if they feel premature. Something's brewing that'll make sense by next week.
daily.health: Your body's asking for slower rhythms today. Consider stretching, walking, or anything that feels grounding. Energy flows where attention goes—send some inward and notice what needs gentle care.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about balance—literally your thing. Venus is vibing with your intuition, so trust those gut feelings about what needs your attention. Something you've been sitting on might finally feel ready to move.
weekly.love: Conversations are hitting different right now. If you've been holding back on saying something real, the cosmos is basically giving you permission. Single or coupled, authenticity is your love language this week.
weekly.career: Your ideas are actually landing with people right now. It's a good time to speak up in meetings or pitch that thing you've been workshopping. Your natural ability to see multiple sides of things is your superpower—use it.
weekly.health: Your energy feels lighter if you stop forcing things. Moving your body in ways that feel good rather than obligatory will shift your whole vibe. Rest isn't laziness; it's strategic.
